title: Requirements For Outputs
description: 触发：需要处理与Requirements For Outputs相关的任务时 | 目标：A user may ask you to create, edit, or analyze the contents  | 步骤：Choose tool**: pandas for data, openpyxl for formulas/formatting；Create/Load**: Create new workbook or load existing file；Modify**: Add/edit data, formulas, and formatting | 产出：计划草案 / 模板
